category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a wrapper around Helm and Flux CD for local development; official GitHub README documents HelmRelease operations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cozyhr; official GitHub README title is "cozyhr" and notes it was formerly known as cozypkg.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes commands, usage assumptions, and installation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cozystack/cozyhr; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Helm and Flux CD; official README lists HelmRelease commands such as apply, diff, reconcile, suspend, and resume.
